name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Direct income support for eligible landholding farmer families.
descriptionDetailed: PM-KISAN provides Rs. 6,000 per year in three equal installments to eligible farmer families, subject to land record and exclusion checks.

notes: Applicant should be part of an eligible landholding farmer family.
Institutional landholders and higher-income exclusion categories are not eligible.

benefits.title: Income support
benefits.description: Paid as three installments of Rs. 2,000.

applicationProcess.title: Check land records
applicationProcess.description: Keep land ownership details and bank account ready.

applicationProcess.title: Register online or through officials
applicationProcess.description: Use the PM-KISAN portal or local agriculture office/CSC.

applicationProcess.title: Track status
applicationProcess.description: Use beneficiary status on the portal after registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana - Gramin
description: Housing assistance for eligible rural households without a pucca house.
descriptionDetailed: PMAY-G supports construction of durable rural houses for households identified through deprivation and local verification criteria.

notes: Rural household should not own a pucca house.
Priority is based on deprivation data and Gram Sabha verification.

benefits.title: Housing assistance
benefits.description: Assistance varies by plain or hilly/difficult area.

applicationProcess.title: Check beneficiary list
applicationProcess.description: Use the PMAY-G portal or contact the Gram Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Verify details locally
applicationProcess.description: Household details are verified by local officials.

applicationProcess.title: Receive installment support
applicationProcess.description: Approved beneficiaries receive support through DBT-linked stages.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Cashless hospital treatment cover for eligible poor and vulnerable families.
descriptionDetailed: PM-JAY provides health cover for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization at empanelled hospitals for eligible households.

notes: Eligibility is generally based on deprivation and occupational categories.
Families can check eligibility on the beneficiary portal.

benefits.title: Hospital cover
benefits.description: Cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.

applicationProcess.title: Check eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use the beneficiary portal or visit a CSC/Ayushman Mitra.

applicationProcess.title: Generate Ayushman card
applicationProcess.description: Complete verification at a CSC, hospital help desk, or official app.

applicationProcess.title: Use at hospital
applicationProcess.description: Show the card at an empanelled hospital help desk.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Low-cost life insurance cover through a bank or post office account.
descriptionDetailed: PMJJBY is a renewable one-year life insurance cover for eligible account holders, with premium paid through auto-debit.

notes: Applicant must have a savings bank or post office account.
Premium is auto-debited after consent.

benefits.title: Life cover
benefits.description: Insurance cover for death due to any reason.

applicationProcess.title: Contact bank or post office
applicationProcess.description: Ask for PMJJBY enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Submit consent form
applicationProcess.description: Authorize annual premium auto-debit from one account only.

applicationProcess.title: Renew yearly
applicationProcess.description: Maintain balance before renewal period.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Low-cost accidental death and disability insurance.
descriptionDetailed: PMSBY is a renewable accidental insurance cover for eligible bank or post office account holders.

notes: Applicant must have a participating bank or post office account.
Enrollment is through one account only.

benefits.title: Accident cover
benefits.description: Cover depends on death, total disability, or partial disability.

applicationProcess.title: Visit bank or post office
applicationProcess.description: Ask for PMSBY enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Submit consent
applicationProcess.description: Authorize annual premium auto-debit.

applicationProcess.title: Keep nominee updated
applicationProcess.description: Update nominee details when needed.

name: National Scholarship Portal
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Single portal for central and state education scholarships.
descriptionDetailed: NSP helps students discover, apply for, and track scholarship schemes from multiple ministries and states.

notes: Eligibility depends on the selected scholarship.
Most scholarships require current enrollment and income/category proof.

benefits.title: Scholarship support
benefits.description: Tuition, maintenance, or merit-based support depending on scheme.

applicationProcess.title: Register on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Create a student profile on the official portal.

applicationProcess.title: Select eligible scheme
applicationProcess.description: Use profile details to find available scholarships.

applicationProcess.title: Submit and track
applicationProcess.description: Upload documents and track verification online.

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Loans for non-corporate, non-farm micro and small enterprises.
descriptionDetailed: MUDRA supports small entrepreneurs through Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun loan categories via banks, MFIs, and NBFCs.

notes: Business should be a non-corporate, non-farm income-generating activity.
Loan sanction is by lending institutions.

benefits.title: Business loan
benefits.description: Credit support through Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun categories.

applicationProcess.title: Prepare business details
applicationProcess.description: Collect business plan, ID, and bank details.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through lender
applicationProcess.description: Approach a bank/MFI/NBFC or use Udyamimitra.

applicationProcess.title: Complete lender checks
applicationProcess.description: Submit documents requested by the lending institution.

name: DAY-NRLM Self Help Groups
description: Rural livelihood support through women-led self-help groups.
descriptionDetailed: DAY-NRLM mobilizes rural poor households into self-help groups and supports savings, credit linkage, skills, and livelihoods.

notes: Designed mainly for rural poor households, especially women.
Access is usually through local SHG/community institutions.

benefits.title: SHG livelihood support
benefits.description: Savings, bank linkage, livelihood training, and enterprise support.

applicationProcess.title: Contact local mission staff
applicationProcess.description: Ask the Gram Panchayat or block mission team about SHGs.

applicationProcess.title: Join or form SHG
applicationProcess.description: Participate in group savings and meetings.

applicationProcess.title: Access credit and training
applicationProcess.description: Use SHG linkage for livelihood activities.

name: MGNREGA
description: Legal entitlement to demand wage employment for rural households.
descriptionDetailed: MGNREGA provides wage employment on demand to adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.

notes: Applicant must be an adult member of a rural household.
Work is requested through a job card.

benefits.title: Wage employment
benefits.description: Wages are paid for approved unskilled manual work.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for job card
applicationProcess.description: Submit household details to Gram Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Demand work
applicationProcess.description: Request work when needed through the Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Track payments
applicationProcess.description: Track muster roll and payment status on the official portal.

helplineNumber: Contact Gram Panchayat / district programme officer

name: e-Shram Card
description: National database registration for unorganised workers.
descriptionDetailed: e-Shram registers unorganised workers so they can be connected to social security and welfare benefits.

notes: Worker should be in the unorganised sector.
Applicant should not be a member of EPFO/ESIC/NPS government-funded coverage.

benefits.title: Worker registration
benefits.description: Connects eligible workers to social security delivery.

applicationProcess.title: Register on portal
applicationProcess.description: Use self-registration or visit a CSC.

applicationProcess.title: Complete verification
applicationProcess.description: Provide required mobile and identity details on the official portal.

applicationProcess.title: Download card
applicationProcess.description: Download the e-Shram card after registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Crop insurance against notified natural risks for notified crops.
descriptionDetailed: PMFBY provides crop insurance for farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers with required documents.

notes: Farmer must have insurable interest in a notified crop and area.
Enrollment is season-bound and optional for farmers as per current guidelines.

benefits.title: Crop risk cover
benefits.description: Farmer premium is capped for major crop categories; claims depend on notified loss assessment.

applicationProcess.title: Check crop notification
applicationProcess.description: Confirm crop, season, and area on PMFBY portal.

applicationProcess.title: Enroll before cut-off
applicationProcess.description: Apply online, through bank, or CSC before season deadline.

applicationProcess.title: Report losses quickly
applicationProcess.description: Use portal/helpline/insurer process for localized losses.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement-linked skill training for rural poor youth.
descriptionDetailed: DDU-GKY trains rural youth from poor households and links them with jobs that provide regular wages.

notes: Designed for rural poor youth.
Upper age relaxation may apply for women and vulnerable groups.

benefits.title: Skill training
benefits.description: Training, counselling, and placement-linked support.

applicationProcess.title: Find training centre
applicationProcess.description: Use DDU-GKY resources or contact district rural livelihood mission.

applicationProcess.title: Register for course
applicationProcess.description: Choose a suitable trade and complete enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Complete placement support
applicationProcess.description: Attend training, assessment, and placement activities.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension support for eligible older persons from BPL households.
descriptionDetailed: IGNOAPS provides central pension assistance for people aged 60 and above who belong to BPL households, with states adding their contribution.

notes: Applicant should be age 60 or above.
Household should be below poverty line as per applicable criteria.

benefits.title: Monthly pension
benefits.description: State contribution can increase the pension amount.

applicationProcess.title: Contact local office
applicationProcess.description: Apply through Gram Panchayat, municipality, or social welfare office.

applicationProcess.title: Submit proof
applicationProcess.description: Provide age, residence, income/BPL, and bank details.

applicationProcess.title: Track pension
applicationProcess.description: Track through state portal or NSAP reporting where available.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Short-term skill training and certification for youth.
descriptionDetailed: PMKVY helps youth access industry-relevant skill training, certification, and career pathways through approved skill centers.

notes: Eligibility can vary by job role and training type.
Candidate should meet age and course prerequisites.

benefits.title: Training and certification
benefits.description: Skill training, assessment, certification, and counselling.

applicationProcess.title: Find course
applicationProcess.description: Use Skill India Digital or PMKVY resources.

applicationProcess.title: Register with center
applicationProcess.description: Choose a nearby training center or online course.

applicationProcess.title: Complete assessment
applicationProcess.description: Attend training and assessment for certification.

name: PM SVANidhi
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Collateral-free working capital loan support for street vendors.
descriptionDetailed: PM SVANidhi supports eligible street vendors with working capital loans in progressive tranches and incentives for repayment and digital transactions.

notes: Applicant should be an eligible street vendor or hawker.
Certificate of vending, ID card, or Letter of Recommendation may be required.

benefits.title: Working capital loan
benefits.description: Initial and repeat loans based on repayment history.

applicationProcess.title: Check vendor documents
applicationProcess.description: Keep vending ID/certificate or request Letter of Recommendation.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on portal
applicationProcess.description: Submit application on PM SVANidhi portal.

applicationProcess.title: Repay digitally
applicationProcess.description: Timely repayment improves eligibility for next tranche.

name: PM Vishwakarma
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Holistic support to artisans and craftspeople through skill training, toolkit incentives, and credit support.
descriptionDetailed: A Central Sector Scheme to provide end-to-end support to artisans and craftspeople working with their hands. It includes skill training, a toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, and collateral-free credit support up to ₹3 lakh.

notes: Must be a practicing artisan/craftsperson engaged in one of the 18 family-based traditional trades.
Only one member per family is eligible.

benefits.title: Toolkit Incentive
benefits.description: Given at the beginning of basic skill training.

benefits.title: Credit Support
benefits.description: Collateral-free credit in two tranches with concessional interest rate.

applicationProcess.title: CSC Registration
applicationProcess.description: Register directly via Common Service Centres with Aadhaar.

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized workers.
descriptionDetailed: Under this scheme, subscribers receive a minimum assured pension of ₹3000 per month after attaining the age of 60 years. If the subscriber dies, the spouse of the beneficiary shall be entitled to receive 50% of the pension.

notes: Monthly income should not exceed ₹15,000.
Should not be engaged in Organized Sector.
Should not be an income taxpayer.

benefits.title: Assured Pension
benefits.description: Minimum assured pension after 60 years of age.

applicationProcess.title: Nearest CSC
applicationProcess.description: Visit nearest Common Service Centre with Aadhaar and Savings Bank account.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides farmers with timely credit support from the banking system with flexible and simplified procedures.
descriptionDetailed: The Kisan Credit Card scheme aims to meet the short term credit requirements for cultivation of crops, post-harvest expenses, produce marketing loan, and consumption requirements of farmer households. Allied activities like dairy and inland fishery are also supported.

notes: All farmers (individuals/joint borrowers) who are owner cultivators.
Tenant farmers, oral lessees & share croppers.

benefits.title: Credit limit
benefits.description: Short-term credit limits for crop and allied activities.

benefits.title: Interest Subvention
benefits.description: Concession for prompt repayment.

applicationProcess.title: Bank Branch
applicationProcess.description: Apply via nearest commercial bank, regional rural bank, or cooperative bank.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST communities for setting up greenfield enterprises.
descriptionDetailed: Aims to facilitate bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC or ST borrower, and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. This enterprise may be in manufacturing, services, agri-allied activities, or the trading sector.

notes: Must be an SC/ST OR a Woman entrepreneur.
Loans under the scheme are available for only green field projects.

benefits.title: Bank Loan
benefits.description: Composite loan (inclusive of term loan and working capital).

applicationProcess.title: Online or Branch
applicationProcess.description: Access directly at the branch or through the Stand-Up India portal.

name: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Credit-linked subsidy support for new micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas.
descriptionDetailed: PMEGP supports new self-employment ventures and micro-enterprises through bank-linked loans with margin money subsidy. It is intended to help traditional artisans, aspiring entrepreneurs, and unemployed youth start non-farm businesses.

notes: Applicant must be setting up a new micro-enterprise project.
Manufacturing and service projects above certain cost thresholds may require at least Class 8 education.
Existing units that already received similar government subsidy are not eligible.

benefits.title: Margin money subsidy
benefits.description: Government subsidy is routed through banks to support eligible new micro-enterprises.

benefits.title: Project support
benefits.amount: Up to Rs. 50 lakh manufacturing / Rs. 20 lakh service
benefits.description: Eligible project ceilings depend on the sector and current scheme guidelines.

applicationProcess.title: Prepare business idea
applicationProcess.description: Choose a new non-farm project and keep basic project details ready.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on PMEGP portal
applicationProcess.description: Submit the online PMEGP application and select the implementing agency or bank path.

applicationProcess.title: Complete bank and training steps
applicationProcess.description: Respond to scrutiny, interview, EDP training, and bank processing if shortlisted.

helplineNumber: Contact KVIC / DIC / nodal bank branch

name: Apprenticeship Training Portal
description: National apprenticeship portal for industry-linked training opportunities.
descriptionDetailed: The Apprenticeship Training Portal connects learners and job-seekers with apprenticeship opportunities that combine basic training with on-the-job practical learning in establishments across India.

notes: Eligibility varies by apprenticeship type, trade, and employer requirements.
Applicants typically need relevant education or training background for the chosen opportunity.

benefits.title: Hands-on training
benefits.description: Candidates receive practical workplace learning through apprenticeship contracts.

benefits.title: Stipend support
benefits.description: Many apprenticeship opportunities provide a stipend during training.

applicationProcess.title: Create candidate profile
applicationProcess.description: Register on the national apprenticeship portal with education and contact details.

applicationProcess.title: Browse openings
applicationProcess.description: Search for apprenticeship opportunities by location, trade, or employer.

applicationProcess.title: Apply and track
applicationProcess.description: Apply online and monitor updates from the employer or training establishment.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
description: Support for fisheries development, aquaculture, value chain, and fishers' welfare activities.
descriptionDetailed: PMMSY is a national fisheries development scheme that supports infrastructure, production, productivity, post-harvest management, and welfare-oriented interventions across the fisheries value chain.

notes: Eligible activities and subsidy patterns vary by component, state implementation, and beneficiary category.
Beneficiary selection and project sanction often happen through the concerned State or Union Territory fisheries department.

benefits.title: Project assistance
benefits.description: Financial support is available for eligible fisheries and aquaculture activities under scheme guidelines.

benefits.title: Infrastructure and value chain support
benefits.description: The scheme supports assets such as ponds, hatcheries, cold chain, transport, marketing, and related fisheries infrastructure.

applicationProcess.title: Identify eligible activity
applicationProcess.description: Check the fisheries activity or project component relevant to your work.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through fisheries channel
applicationProcess.description: Use the PMMSY portal or contact the State fisheries department for the active beneficiary workflow.

applicationProcess.title: Submit project details
applicationProcess.description: Provide quotations, land or water-body details, category proofs, and bank information where required.

documents: Relevant fisheries license or local approval if applicable

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Scholarship support for meritorious students from lower-income families pursuing higher studies.
descriptionDetailed: This central scholarship supports meritorious students from economically weaker families to continue regular college, university, and professional higher education courses.

notes: Applicant should be above the 80th percentile in Class 12 or equivalent examination in the relevant board stream.
Family income should be within the scheme ceiling in current guidelines.
Student should be pursuing a regular higher education course and should not be receiving another major scholarship for the same purpose.

benefits.title: Graduation scholarship
benefits.description: Support for the first years of eligible college and university study as per current norms.

benefits.title: Postgraduate or advanced year support
benefits.description: Higher annual support applies for postgraduate study or specified advanced years under the scheme rules.

applicationProcess.title: Confirm board merit and income eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Check percentile position, family income, and course eligibility before applying.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Register and submit the scholarship application through the National Scholarship Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Track verification
applicationProcess.description: Monitor institute, state, and central verification status on the portal.
